description: Generate many images concurrently from a JSONL prompt file via the GPT Image fallback CLI (image_gen.py generate-batch).
rules: local-output only: writes images into record_store/batch + a request preview under record_store; never pushes to a remote
porter runs the CLI in --dry-run --no-augment so it validates every job and resolves output paths offline (no OPENAI_API_KEY, no network)
INPUT is a JSONL file: one prompt string or job object per line; blank lines and #-comments are skipped; max 500 jobs
a real (non-dry-run) batch requires OPENAI_API_KEY and the openai SDK; the porter degrades gracefully when they are absent
usage: Set INPUT (path to the JSONL job file), required. Optional: MODEL, SIZE, QUALITY, CONCURRENCY. Outputs go to record_store/batch; the preview is batch.json.
limitation: The vendored porter only previews each job (--dry-run). Producing real pixels needs OPENAI_API_KEY + the openai SDK and is not performed by this governed porter.
